title: sorbus aria proles latifolia
intro: Sorbus aria proles latifolia, also known as the 'Whitebeam', is a variety of mountain ash tree that is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and polyphenol content. The health benefits of Sorbus aria proles latifolia include its ability to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and help with respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves, bark, or flowers in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
